Hero.headline_1: Run Your Entire Car Rental Business From
Hero.subtext: CarRental.digital is the complete cloud operating system for modern fleets. Set up your booking engine, sign digital contracts, manage vehicle maintenance, and process payments automatically.
Hero.btn_trial: Start Free Trial — No Card Needed

ProblemBand.heading: Still running your rental business with spreadsheets, phone calls, and paper contracts?
ProblemBand.item_1_problem: Bookings made over phone or WhatsApp — missed, confused, double-booked
ProblemBand.item_1_fix: Real-time online booking engine on your own website. Zero double-bookings.
ProblemBand.item_2_problem: Fleet tracked in Excel — you never know what's available
ProblemBand.item_2_fix: Live fleet calendar. Every vehicle's status visible in one screen.
ProblemBand.item_3_fix: Digital contracts. Customer signs online. Stored forever in the cloud.
ProblemBand.item_4_problem: Invoices built manually in Word or paper
ProblemBand.item_4_fix: Auto-generated invoices, payment links, and reminders.
ProblemBand.item_5_problem: Customer data scattered across phones and notebooks
ProblemBand.item_5_fix: Full CRM. Every customer, every rental, every payment — in one profile.
ProblemBand.item_6_problem: No idea which vehicles make money, which sit idle
ProblemBand.item_6_fix: Real-time analytics. Fleet utilization, revenue, and occupancy at a glance.
ProblemBand.item_7_fix: Your own professional booking website included. Your domain. Your brand.
ProblemBand.item_8_fix: 100% cloud. Automatic backups. Your data is always safe and always there.
ProblemBand.stat_text_before: Rental businesses using CarRental.digital report saving

WhatIs.heading: One System. Every Function. Zero Complications.
WhatIs.subheading: CarRental.digital is a cloud-based management system purpose-built for car rental businesses. Whether you operate 20 vehicles from one location or 500+ vehicles across multiple brands and branches — our system handles every function your business runs on.
WhatIs.item_1_desc: A fully branded website, on your domain, with a live booking engine your customers use to reserve cars, choose add-ons, pay online, and receive confirmations — automatically.
WhatIs.item_2_desc: One login. Manage fleet, reservations, customers, contracts, payments, staff, and reports. Desktop, tablet, or mobile — it works anywhere because it lives in the cloud.
WhatIs.item_3_desc: Your customers get their own portal to manage bookings, view invoices, upload documents, and sign agreements — all online, all professional, all under your brand.

HowItWorks.heading: You're Set Up and Running in 48 Hours.
HowItWorks.subheading: Our team handles the transition, setup, and domain connection so you can focus on running your business.
HowItWorks.step_1_desc: We set up your system to match your business — your brand, your vehicles, your pricing rules, your locations. No generic templates. Your system, your way.
HowItWorks.step_2_title: Go Live With Your Own Website
HowItWorks.step_2_desc: Your branded website goes live on your domain with the booking engine active. Customers can start making online reservations immediately.
HowItWorks.step_3_desc: Manage your full operation from your admin panel. Fleet, bookings, customers, contracts, invoices, and reports — all in one place, accessible from anywhere.

SocialProof.heading: Rental Businesses in the US and Europe Trust CarRental.digital
SocialProof.subheading: Join hundreds of operators who replaced manual admin with a professional, automated system.
SocialProof.testimonial_1_quote: Before CarRental.digital, we were taking bookings on WhatsApp and writing contracts by hand. Now our customers book online, sign digitally, and we handle twice the volume with the same team.
SocialProof.testimonial_2_quote: We run three brands from one admin. The multi-brand view alone saved us from hiring an extra manager. Everything is in one place.
SocialProof.testimonial_3_quote: The support team is genuinely 24/7. I called at 2am with a payment setup issue and it was resolved in 20 minutes. That kind of support doesn't exist elsewhere.

SupportBand.subheading: Real humans. Real answers. Any hour of the day or night. Whether you're setting up, scaling up, or solving an issue — our support team is always available by chat, email, or phone.

AboutPage.heading: Built by People Who Understand Car Rental
AboutPage.subheading: CarRental.digital is a product of Maruti Digital India. We are dedicated to providing the ultimate digital tools to modern fleet operators across the US and Europe.
AboutPage.story_p1: CarRental.digital was founded out of a simple observation: while large car rental conglomerates have access to state-of-the-art enterprise software, independent and mid-sized fleet operators are often left managing their entire operations with spreadsheets, paper forms, and fragmented systems.
AboutPage.story_p2: We set out to build a comprehensive, reliable, and user-friendly operating system that bridges this gap. By combining website hosting, a live booking engine, digital contracts, and automated invoicing under a single platform, we help operators streamline their workflow, eliminate double-bookings, and grow their businesses.
AboutPage.mission_quote: To empower independent car rental operators in the US and Europe with tools as powerful as the global chains use.
AboutPage.mission_desc: Backed by Maruti Digital India — Trusted Technology from India, Built for the World.
AboutPage.values_subtitle: The principles that guide our product development and customer support every day.
AboutPage.value_1_desc: We measure our success by the growth of our operators. Our 24/7 support ensures you are never left solving a problem alone.
AboutPage.value_2_desc: Your business data is precious. We implement enterprise-grade encryption and automated daily backups to keep it safe.
AboutPage.value_3_desc: The rental industry is constantly changing. We release weekly updates to ensure you always have the most modern features.
AboutPage.team_subtitle: The dedicated people building the future of car rental management.
